arts.ttl: Liverpool changing approach under Arne Slot and impact of one player is proof

arts.ttl: Inside £150m transfer plan to rebuild Liverpool as new Ryan Gravenberch details emerge

arts.ttl: Liverpool hint at accounts given as £604m figure can't stop Arsenal taking advantage

arts.ttl: Liverpool supporters' unacceptable abuse of Curtis Jones online reveals a dangerous truth about modern fandom, writes IAN LADYMAN
arts.sum: IAN LADYMAN: Curtis Jones posted a photo on his Instagram this week of him celebrating a Mohamed Salah goal. Many of the comments were pleasant and many were not.

arts.ttl: Emerging left-back responds to Liverpool transfer links
arts.sum: Senegal and Slavia Prague left-back El Hadji Malick Diouf has been linked with Liverpool in January.
